questions.question: Select the best express Antonym of the given underlined word. The heavy rains provided a temporary reprieve from the scorching summer heat.
questions.explanation: D) Reprieve(noun) – relief, delay, suspension, postponement, stay राहत Antonym: Continuation(noun) – The act of carrying on without interruption. (निरंतरता / जारी रखना) Relief(noun) – Ease from pain or trouble. (राहत) Delay(noun) – A period of time by which something is late. (विलंब) Suspension(noun) – Temporary pause. (स्थगन)

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given phrase. Something that has the quality of being easily broken.
questions.explanation: B)Brittle(adjective) – Something that has the quality of being easily broken. भंगुर Damage(noun) – Harm or injury caused to something, making it less valuable, useful, or functional. क्षति Broken(adjective) – Reduced to fragments or not functioning; having been fractured or damaged. टूटा हुआ Hard(adjective) – Firm, solid, and not easily broken or bent. कठोर

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. Some municipalities like Chennai, Mumbai and Hyderabad (A) / were forced to cutting water supplies (B) / to ensure their reserves lasted until (C) / monsoon rains replenished reservoirs. (D)
options: Some municipalities like Chennai, Mumbai and Hyderabad
were forced to cutting water supplies
to ensure their reserves lasted until
questions.explanation: B) ‘cutting' के बदले 'cut' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'to' के बाद verb की first form (base form) का प्रयोग होता है (Infinitive without 'to' rule). 'cut' will be used instead of 'cutting' because after 'to' the base form (first form) of the verb is used (Infinitive rule).

questions.question: Select the best express Antonym of the given underlined word. The survey results were skewed because only a specific age group was included.
questions.explanation: D) Skewed(adjective) – unbalanced, biased, distorted, uneven, tilted असंतुलित Antonym: Balanced(adjective) – Fair, equal, impartial, even (संतुलित) Distorted(adjective) – Twisted, misrepresented, deformed (विकृत) Tilted(adjective) – Leaning, slanted, inclined (झुका हुआ) Uneven(adjective) – Irregular, rough, inconsistent (असमान)

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. P. However, navigating the digital world requires a thorough understanding of the tools at our disposal. Q. Emojis are one such tool. R. The rise of information technology has revolutionised communication, making it faster, easier, and more affordable. S. Traditional forms of written communication, such as inland letters and telegrams, have largely fallen out of use, replaced by digital alternatives such as emails and SMS, and messaging apps such as WhatsApp and Instagram.
questions.explanation: A)RSPQ R: The paragraph starts with R, as it introduces the main topic: the rise of information technology and how it has revolutionized communication, making it faster, easier, and more affordable. S: S logically follows R, as it provides specific examples of how traditional forms of communication, like inland letters and telegrams, have been replaced by digital alternatives like emails, SMS, and messaging apps such as WhatsApp and Instagram. This sentence builds upon the transformation mentioned in R and gives concrete examples to show the shift from traditional to digital communication. P: P comes next, introducing the idea that navigating the digital world requires a thorough understanding of the tools available to us. This sentence connects the previous information about digital communication with the need to understand these new tools. Q: Q concludes the paragraph by giving an example of one such tool: emojis. This sentence ties back to P, reinforcing the idea that understanding these tools (like emojis) is essential in the digital communication world.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. The assignment was _________ early in the morning.
questions.explanation: A) 'Due' का use होगा क्योंकि "due" का अर्थ होता है निर्धारित समय पर होना या किसी काम का समय पर पूरा होना। sentence में mention किया गया है कि assignment सुबह जल्दी पूरा होना था, इसलिए 'due' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Dew' का अर्थ है ओस, 'Doe' का अर्थ है हिरनी, और 'Do' का अर्थ है करना, जो इस context में सही नहीं है। 'Due' will be used because it means expected or scheduled to happen at a particular time. The sentence mentions that the assignment was to be completed early in the morning, making 'due' correct here. Whereas, 'Dew' means moisture on the ground, 'Doe' means a female deer, and 'Do' means to perform an action, which do not fit in this context. "Due" is an adjective describing when the assignment was expected. The other options are either nouns (dew, doe) or a verb (do), which do not fit grammatically in this sentence structure

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. The teacher tried to dispel the students’ doubts by explaining the concept again.
questions.explanation: C) Dispel(verb) – eliminate, remove, dismiss, drive away, clear दूर करना Synonym: Remove(verb) – Eliminate, erase, clear. हटाना Increase(verb) – Grow, enhance, amplify. बढ़ाना Encourage(verb) – Motivate, inspire, support. प्रोत्साहित करना Confirm(verb) – Verify, validate, affirm. पुष्टि करना

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word. A) Occasion B) Privilege C) Bizzare D) Definitely
questions.explanation: C) The incorrectly spelt word is C)Bizzare. The correct spelling isBizarre, which means "very strange or unusual" (बहुत अजीब या असामान्य).

questions.question: Select the most appropriate article to fill in the blank. Select 'no article' if no article is required. The doctor asked the patient to have _____ MRI scan of his brain.
questions.explanation: C) ‘An'का use होगा क्योंकि 'MRI' शब्द का उच्चारण vowel sound से शुरू होता है। 'M' को जब उच्चारित किया जाता है तो यह 'em' की तरह सुनाई देता है, जो एक vowel sound है। इसलिए 'an' सही article है। जबकि: 'A' का use consonant sound से शुरू होने वाले शब्दों के लिए होता है, इसलिए यह यहाँ सही नहीं है। 'No article' का use तभी होता है जब noun indefinite या general context में हो और article की आवश्यकता न हो। 'The' का use specific या definite noun के लिए होता है। चूंकि यहाँ MRI scan का ज़िक्र पहली बार किया जा रहा है, इसलिए 'the' का use गलत है। 'An'is the correct article because the pronunciation of 'MRI' starts with a vowel sound ('em'), making 'an' appropriate. Whereas: 'A' is used before words that start with a consonant sound, which doesn't apply here. 'No article' is used when the noun is indefinite or general, but that's not the case here as 'MRI scan' refers to a specific test. 'The' is used for definite nouns. Since 'MRI scan' is mentioned for the first time here, 'the' is inappropriate.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. She gave him a cold stare, making it clear she was not in the mood to talk.
questions.explanation: D) Cold(adjective) – distant, unfriendly, indifferent, aloof, detached बेरुखा Synonym: Distant(adjective) – Reserved, detached, remote. दूरस्थ Warm(adjective) – Kind, affectionate, cordial. गर्मजोशी Friendly(adjective) – Amiable, sociable, kind. मिलनसार Affectionate(adjective) – Loving, tender, warm. स्नेही

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word.
questions.explanation: B)Exagerate, and the correct spelling isExaggerate. बढ़ा-चढ़ाकरकहना

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. The space or room that is at the top of a building or just below the main roof
questions.explanation: A)Attic(noun) – The space or room that is at the top of a building or just below the main roof. अटारी Ceiling(noun) – The upper interior surface of a room. छत Dome(noun) – A rounded vault forming the roof of a building or structure, typically with a circular base. गुम्बद Stairs(noun) – A set of steps leading from one floor of a building to another. सीढ़ियां

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given underlined word. The rebellious teenager refused to follow any rules, constantly challenging authority.
questions.explanation: A) Rebellious(adjective) – defiant, disobedient, unruly, insurgent, resistant विद्रोही / विरोधी Synonym: Defiant(adjective) – Boldly resistant, rebellious. अवज्ञाकारी Obedient(adjective) – Complying with orders. आज्ञाकारी Submissive(adjective) – Meekly obedient. विनम्र Compliant(adjective) – Obedient to rules. अनुपालन करने वाला

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. Sree did not go to work today, as she was feeling a bit under the weather.
questions.explanation: C)feeling a bit under the weather(idiom)- Feeling ill (बीमार महसूस करना)

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. Li and colleagues examined data on 1,848 women in the U. S. and found that (A) / those with the highest levels of triclosan in (B) / their urine were two and a half times as likely to have (C) / osteoporosis than women with the lowest triclosan levels. (D)
options: Li and colleagues examined data on 1,848 women in the U. S. and found that
those with the highest levels of triclosan in
their urine were two and a half times as likely to have
osteoporosis than women with the lowest triclosan levels.
questions.explanation: D) 'than' के बदले'as' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'as likely as' एक सही comparative structure है। 'than' का प्रयोग तब होता है जब comparative degree में 'more' या '-er' form का प्रयोग होता है, लेकिन यहाँ 'as...as' structure का प्रयोग हो रहा है; जैसे— She is as tall as her brother. 'as' will be used instead of 'than' because 'as likely as' is the correct comparative structure. 'Than' is used when 'more' or '-er' form is used in the comparative degree, but here the 'as...as' structure is being used; Like— She is as tall as her brother.

questions.question: If someone mentions that 'the ball is in your court', what does this idiom imply?
options: It's your turn to make a decision or take action.
It's time to play a sport.
questions.explanation: A)The ball is in your court– Responsibility to take the next step निर्णय या अगला कदम उठाने की जिम्मेदारी आपकी है।

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Grease someone's palm
questions.explanation: D)Grease someone's palm(idiom): To bribe someone to gain favor or advantage. किसी को रिश्वत देना या कुछ हासिल करने के लिए किसी का पक्ष लेना।

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. With temperatures in northern Spain and southern France (A) / set of exceed 44C, governments urged their citizens (B) / to take the utmost precaution, warning that (C) / in some areas the worst was yet to come. (D)
options: With temperatures in northern Spain and southern France
set of exceed 44C, governments urged their citizens
to take the utmost precaution, warning that
in some areas the worst was yet to come.
questions.explanation: B) set of exceed' के बदले'set to exceed'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि यहाँ पर 'to' infinitive का प्रयोग होता है जो कि भविष्य में होने वाली संभावना को दर्शाता है। 'set to exceed'will be used instead of 'set of exceed' because here 'to' infinitive is used which shows the possibility of something happening in the future.

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. P. On July 30, two villages, Mundakkai and Chooralmala, in the Wayanad district of Kerala, were hit by landslides. Q. On October 4, while noting that the disaster ranked among the deadliest in India, Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan said that 231 people had died and 41 remained missing. R. At the same time, it has raised questions about our approach to disaster management not only in the area of Wayanad that was affected this time and that has suffered a few deadly landslides over the last four decades, but for the State as a whole. S. The catastrophic event has once again exposed our helplessness in the face of nature’s fury.
questions.explanation: A)PQSR P: Paragraph की शुरुआत P से होती है, जो घटना का introduction देता है कि 30 जुलाई को वायनाड जिले के दो गांवों, Mundakkai और Chooralmala में भूस्खलन (landslides) हुआ। Q: इसके बाद Q आता है, जो घटना की गंभीरता (seriousness) को और स्पष्ट करता है। 4 अक्टूबर को मुख्यमंत्री पिनाराई विजयन ने बताया कि 231 लोगों की मृत्यु हो चुकी है और 41 लोग अभी भी लापता हैं। S: फिर S आता है, जो इस घटना के emotional impact को व्यक्त करता है। यह बताता है कि यह घटना फिर से हमारी प्रकृति के प्रकोप (nature's fury) के सामने असहायता (helplessness) को उजागर करती है। यह sentence Q में दी गई जानकारी के बाद एक उपयुक्त निष्कर्ष (reflection) प्रस्तुत करता है। R: End में R आता है, जो इस पूरी घटना को एक व्यापक दृष्टिकोण (broader perspective) से देखता है। यह बताता है कि यह घटना केवल वायनाड क्षेत्र ही नहीं, बल्कि पूरे राज्य में disaster management approach पर सवाल खड़ा करती है। यह sentence पूरे paragraph को wrap-up करता है और सुधार की आवश्यकता की बात करता है।Explanation in English P:The paragraph begins with P, which introduces the disaster that occurred on July 30 in two villages of Wayanad, Kerala. It provides the essential background to the event and sets the stage for the discussion. Q:Q logically follows P, as it provides specific details about the magnitude of the disaster. It mentions that on October 4, Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan noted that 231 people had died and 41 were still missing. S:S comes next, summarizing the emotional impact of the disaster by stating that it exposed our helplessness against nature's fury. This reflection adds depth to the discussion by emphasizing the human vulnerability that such disasters bring to light. R:R concludes the paragraph by broadening the scope of the discussion, raising questions about our approach to disaster management not just in Wayanad but for the state as a whole. It wraps up the paragraph by suggesting that this disaster should make us reconsider our preparedness for such events in the future.

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Select the option that gives their correct logical sequence. A. The origin of the term could be traced to refurbishing a building with lime-wash which had can hide defects and present an attractive appearance. B. Long before the advent of paint, the old-fashioned and economical whitewash was the order of the day. C. The term “to whitewash” is metaphorically used to mean glossing over or concealing faults. D. Mark Twain’s classic account of how Tom Sawyer whitewashed a fence had immortalised this occupation.
questions.explanation: C)CABD C: The paragraph starts with C as it introduces the term “to whitewash” and its metaphorical meaning, which is to gloss over or conceal faults. A: A follows C logically because it traces the origin of the term “whitewash” to the practice of refurbishing a building with lime-wash to hide defects and give an attractive appearance. This sentence explains the historical background of the term introduced in C. B: B comes next, providing more context about the historical use of whitewash before the advent of modern paint. It explains that the old-fashioned and economical whitewash was commonly used, reinforcing the point made in A about the practical use of whitewash in the past. D: D concludes the paragraph by referencing Mark Twain’s classic story where Tom Sawyer whitewashed a fence, which made this activity famous. This sentence wraps up the paragraph by linking the concept of whitewashing to a well-known literary reference, adding depth and a cultural touch to the discussion.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Fill in the blanks with the help of the alternatives given. Select the most appropriate option for each number. How environmental problems ____1_____ different groups is a function of social inequality. Social status and power determine the _______2____ to which people can insulate themselves from environmental crises or overcome them. In some cases, their ‘solutions’may actually worsen environmental disparities. In Kutch, Gujarat, where water is scarce, richer farmers have ____3____ in deep bore tubewells to tap groundwater to irrigate their fields and grow cash crops. When the rains fail, the earthen wells of the poorer villagers run dry and they do not even have water to drink. At such times, the moist green fields of the rich farmers seem to mock them. Certain environmental concerns sometimes appear to be universal concerns, not particular to ____4_____ social groups. For instance,______5_______ air pollution or protecting biodiversity seems to be in the public interest. A sociological analysis shows, however, that how public priorities are set and how they are pursued may not be universally beneficial Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 1
questions.explanation: B)Affect'का use होगा क्योंकि यह एक verb है, जिसका अर्थ होता है किसी चीज़ पर प्रभाव डालना। वाक्य में mention है कि पर्यावरणीय समस्याएं विभिन्न समूहों को कैसे प्रभावित करती हैं, इसलिए यहाँ "affect" सही है। दूसरी ओर: 'Effect' एक संज्ञा (noun) है, जिसका अर्थ है किसी क्रिया का परिणाम, जो यहाँ व्याकरणिक रूप से सही नहीं है क्योंकि यहाँ एक verb चाहिए। 'Partial' का अर्थ है अधूरा या पक्षपाती, जो इस संदर्भ में अप्रासंगिक है। 'Adopt' का अर्थ है अपनाना, जो वाक्य के संदर्भ में मेल नहीं खाता। Affect'will be used because it is a verb that means to influence or have an impact on something. The sentence discusses how environmental problems impact different groups, so "affect" fits perfectly in this context. On the other hand: 'Effect' is a noun meaning the result or outcome of an action, which does not align grammatically here as the blank requires a verb. 'Partial' means incomplete or biased, which is irrelevant in this context. 'Adopt' means to take up or accept, which also does not fit the sentence

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Fill in the blanks with the help of the alternatives given. Select the most appropriate option for each number. How environmental problems ____1_____ different groups is a function of social inequality. Social status and power determine the _______2____ to which people can insulate themselves from environmental crises or overcome them. In some cases, their ‘solutions’may actually worsen environmental disparities. In Kutch, Gujarat, where water is scarce, richer farmers have ____3____ in deep bore tubewells to tap groundwater to irrigate their fields and grow cash crops. When the rains fail, the earthen wells of the poorer villagers run dry and they do not even have water to drink. At such times, the moist green fields of the rich farmers seem to mock them. Certain environmental concerns sometimes appear to be universal concerns, not particular to ____4_____ social groups. For instance,______5_______ air pollution or protecting biodiversity seems to be in the public interest. A sociological analysis shows, however, that how public priorities are set and how they are pursued may not be universally beneficial Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2.
questions.explanation: D)‘Extent'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है किसी चीज़ के कवरेज या प्रभाव की सीमा या सीमा। यहां sentence में बताया गया है कि लोग पर्यावरणीय संकटों से बचाव करने या उन्हें पार करने की क्षमता की सीमा की बात हो रही है, इसलिए 'Extent' सबसे उपयुक्त विकल्प है। 'Scope' का अर्थ है कार्य या अवसर की सीमा, जो यहां उचित नहीं है। 'Various' का अर्थ है विभिन्न प्रकार के, जो इस संदर्भ में irrelevant है। 'Expanse' का अर्थ है विस्तृत क्षेत्र, जो यहां context से मेल नहीं खाता। Answer:'Extent'will be used because it means the degree or range to which something is covered or affected. In the context of the sentence, it refers to the range or degree to which people can insulate themselves from environmental crises or overcome them, making 'extent' the most appropriate choice here. 'Scope' means the area of opportunity or range of action, which doesn't fit the idea of degree or range here. 'Various' means different kinds or types, which is irrelevant in this context. 'Expanse' refers to a wide and continuous area, often physical, which also doesn't align with the context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Fill in the blanks with the help of the alternatives given. Select the most appropriate option for each number. How environmental problems ____1_____ different groups is a function of social inequality. Social status and power determine the _______2____ to which people can insulate themselves from environmental crises or overcome them. In some cases, their ‘solutions’may actually worsen environmental disparities. In Kutch, Gujarat, where water is scarce, richer farmers have ____3____ in deep bore tubewells to tap groundwater to irrigate their fields and grow cash crops. When the rains fail, the earthen wells of the poorer villagers run dry and they do not even have water to drink. At such times, the moist green fields of the rich farmers seem to mock them. Certain environmental concerns sometimes appear to be universal concerns, not particular to ____4_____ social groups. For instance,______5_______ air pollution or protecting biodiversity seems to be in the public interest. A sociological analysis shows, however, that how public priorities are set and how they are pursued may not be universally beneficial Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3
questions.explanation: D)Invested'का use होगा क्योंकि "invested" का अर्थ होता है किसी संसाधन या धन को लाभ प्राप्त करने के लिए use करना। वाक्य में बताया गया है कि अमीर किसानों ने गहरे बोर ट्यूबवेल में धन लगाया (invested) ताकि वे अपनी फसलों को पानी दे सकें। इसलिए 'invested' यहाँ उपयुक्त है। 'Provided' का अर्थ है उपलब्ध कराना, जो यहां फिट नहीं बैठता क्योंकि यह संसाधनों को प्रदान करने के संदर्भ में नहीं है। 'Capitalised' का अर्थ है किसी स्थिति का फायदा उठाना, लेकिन इस संदर्भ में यह सही नहीं है। 'Licensed' का अर्थ है अधिकार या अनुमति प्रदान करना, जो यहां उचित नहीं है। 'Invested'will be used because it means to put money or resources into something with the intention of gaining benefit. The sentence states that richer farmers have put money into deep bore tubewells to irrigate their fields, making 'invested' fitting here. 'Provided' means to make available, which doesn't fit as it isn't about making resources available. 'Capitalised' means to take advantage of a situation, but this isn't about taking advantage here. 'Licensed' means to grant permission or authority, which doesn't suit this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Fill in the blanks with the help of the alternatives given. Select the most appropriate option for each number. How environmental problems ____1_____ different groups is a function of social inequality. Social status and power determine the _______2____ to which people can insulate themselves from environmental crises or overcome them. In some cases, their ‘solutions’may actually worsen environmental disparities. In Kutch, Gujarat, where water is scarce, richer farmers have ____3____ in deep bore tubewells to tap groundwater to irrigate their fields and grow cash crops. When the rains fail, the earthen wells of the poorer villagers run dry and they do not even have water to drink. At such times, the moist green fields of the rich farmers seem to mock them. Certain environmental concerns sometimes appear to be universal concerns, not particular to ____4_____ social groups. For instance,______5_______ air pollution or protecting biodiversity seems to be in the public interest. A sociological analysis shows, however, that how public priorities are set and how they are pursued may not be universally beneficial Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4.
questions.explanation: A) 'Specific'का use होगा क्योंकि "specific" का अर्थ होता है किसी विशेष या विशिष्ट चीज़ का उल्लेख करना। Passage में बताया गया है कि कुछ पर्यावरणीय समस्याएँ कभी-कभी सार्वभौमिक चिंताओं के रूप में दिखाई देती हैं, जो किसी विशिष्ट सामाजिक समूह तक सीमित नहीं होती हैं। इसलिए 'specific' यहाँ उपयुक्त है। जबकि 'Restriction' का अर्थ है प्रतिबंध, 'Indefinitely' का अर्थ है अनिश्चित काल के लिए, और 'Exactly' का अर्थ है सटीकता से, जो इस context में सही नहीं हैं। 'Specific'will be used because it means referring to a particular or distinct thing. The passage explains that some environmental concerns sometimes appear to be universal, not limited to specific social groups, making 'specific' suitable here. Whereas, 'Restriction' means limitation, 'Indefinitely' means for an uncertain period, and 'Exactly' means precisely, which don't fit in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Fill in the blanks with the help of the alternatives given. Select the most appropriate option for each number. How environmental problems ____1_____ different groups is a function of social inequality. Social status and power determine the _______2____ to which people can insulate themselves from environmental crises or overcome them. In some cases, their ‘solutions’may actually worsen environmental disparities. In Kutch, Gujarat, where water is scarce, richer farmers have ____3____ in deep bore tubewells to tap groundwater to irrigate their fields and grow cash crops. When the rains fail, the earthen wells of the poorer villagers run dry and they do not even have water to drink. At such times, the moist green fields of the rich farmers seem to mock them. Certain environmental concerns sometimes appear to be universal concerns, not particular to ____4_____ social groups. For instance,______5_______ air pollution or protecting biodiversity seems to be in the public interest. A sociological analysis shows, however, that how public priorities are set and how they are pursued may not be universally beneficial Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5
questions.explanation: A)'Reducing'का use होगा क्योंकि 'reducing' का अर्थ होता है किसी चीज़ की मात्रा को कम करना। Passage में वायु प्रदूषण को कम करने और जैव विविधता की रक्षा की बात की गई है, जो "reducing" शब्द को सही विकल्प बनाता है। 'Manipulating' का अर्थ है किसी चीज़ को नियंत्रित या हेरफेर करना, 'Increasing' का अर्थ है बढ़ाना, और 'Abdicating' का अर्थ है त्याग देना, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं हैं। 'Reducing'will be used because it means to decrease or lessen something. The passage talks about addressing air pollution and protecting biodiversity, making "reducing" the correct choice. 'Manipulating' means to control or handle something in a skillful manner, 'Increasing' means to make something greater in quantity or size, 'Abdicating' means to give up or renounce, none of which fit in this context.
